name: observer
description: Live observe-and-coach discipline for the NVZver marketplace. Rides Claude Code's self-paced /loop and reacts to your file changes through a chosen role. One Actor skill (observer:observe) reads role behavior as data from one Knowledge file (roles.md); the role set is rubber-duck, pair-programmer, interviewer, and custom. Kickoff confirms a role before observing; interviewer sessions scaffold a runnable, initially-failing exercise; feedback follows the active role's lens, voice, and cadence each cycle; roles switch mid-session without restarting the loop. Depends on core (ground-rules, output).
